title: Java Happens Before Guarantee
summary: The Java happens before guarantee provides some restrictions on allowed instruction reordering for the Java VM and CPU. This Java happens before guarantee tutorial explains what these restrictions are. The Java happens before guarantee is actually part of the Java memory model, by the way.
content: The Java happens before guarantee provides some restrictions on allowed instruction reordering for the Java VM and CPU. This Java happens before guarantee tutorial explains what these restrictions are. The Java happens before guarantee is actually part of the Java memory model, by the way.
